allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''version:'', d.get\(''version''\)\); print\(''peerDeps:'', json.dumps\(d.get\(''peerDependencies'',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''metro version:'', d.get\(''version''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''version:'', d.get\(''version''\)\); print\(''engines:'', json.dumps\(d.get\(''engines'',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
